title: CopyEngineeringConductorInput
description: Input schema for the Copy Engineering Conductor evaluation system.

asset_type.description: The type of copy asset being evaluated.

copy.description: The full text of the copy to evaluate. Include all sections, headlines, subheadlines, body, and CTAs.

target_audience.description: Who this copy is written for. Be specific: demographics, role, situation, emotional state.

desired_behavior.description: The exact action the prospect should take after reading this copy. Be specific — not 'get interest' but 'book a consultation call by clicking the CTA button'.

offer.description: What is being offered. Include price if relevant.

stage_of_awareness.description: The prospect's starting awareness level. Determines whether copy meets them where they are or talks past them.

traffic_source.description: Optional. Where this prospect is coming from — cold Facebook ad, warm email list, Google search, referral, etc. Affects attention and trust expectations.

context.description: Optional. Any relevant background: what came before this page, what the prospect already knows, competitive environment, previous messaging.

constraints.description: Optional. Known constraints on the copy — character limits, compliance requirements, things that cannot be changed, brand mandates.

examples.copy:
Stop guessing. Start converting.

Most agencies will redesign your website. We'll fix the part that's actually broken: the copy.

Book a free 30-minute copy audit.

[Book Now]
examples.target_audience: B2B SaaS founders with 10–50 employees whose paid ads are running but not converting.
examples.desired_behavior: Click 'Book Now' and schedule a 30-minute copy audit call.
examples.offer: Free 30-minute copy audit call. No pitch.
examples.traffic_source: Cold LinkedIn ad targeting SaaS founders
examples.context: Visitor has seen an ad that said 'Your copy is why your ads don't convert.' This is the landing page they arrive on.
constraints: Must keep 'free' language visible above the fold
